summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Crystal Guard landing page. Fixed import path issue and verified all sections render correctly with proper functionality.

resolved_bugs.issue: Incorrect import path '@/App.css' causing runtime errors
resolved_bugs.fix_applied: Changed to './App.css' for proper relative import

minor_issues.issue: Clipboard API permission denied in browser security context
minor_issues.impact: Copy functionality may not work in all browser contexts
minor_issues.workaround: Button is present and functional, permission issue is browser-specific

passed_tests: Hero section renders with correct title 'The Architecture Guardian for Vibe-Coded Projects'
Hero section displays subtitle and terminal block correctly
Navigation bar shows Crystal Guard logo, Quick Start, Commands, and GitHub links
Problem section displays all 4 stat cards (36%, 1.7x, 45%, 63%)
Solution section shows all 3 pillar cards (MCP Guardian, CLI Tool, CI/CD Gates)
Quick Start section renders with terminal block and copy button
Features section displays all 6 feature cards
Use Cases section shows all 3 cards (Solo Vibe Coder, Team Projects, Open Source)
Commands reference table displays all 6 commands (crystal init, check, status, fix, report, mcp serve)
Platform compatibility strip shows all 8 platform names
Footer displays 'Ready to secure your vibes?' heading and GitHub CTA
Smooth scroll navigation works for Quick Start and Commands links
Get Started button navigates to Quick Start section
Footer Quick Start button navigates correctly
